title: Resolution Recommending the Use of an Oral Gargle and Nose Rinse with Povidone Iodine (PVP-I) for Our Covid-19 Patients and High Risk Health Workers in the Community Based on the Proposal Crafted by the Philippine-american Academy of Science and Engineers (PAASE). (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 04/12/2021)
